workshoptitle: Build a Recipe App with Oracle Backend for Firebase — Android

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Review the learner journey and workshop architecture for the Android RecipeShare app.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Create Your First Project
tutorials.description: Open the console, create your first project, and set the starter security rules.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Connect the Android App
tutorials.description: Clone the repo, open the Android Studio project, register an Android app, paste the config, and verify the connection in the Android Emulator.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Authentication
tutorials.description: Add sign-up, sign-in, and sign-out to the Android app using the Fusabase auth module.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Read Recipe Data
tutorials.description: Subscribe to the recipes collection with a snapshot listener, render with a RecyclerView, and seed demo data.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Write Recipe Data
tutorials.description: Implement createRecipe and addRating to write data as an authenticated user.

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Photo Upload
tutorials.description: Upload recipe photos from the Android Photo Picker and display them using the Fusabase storage module.

tutorials.title: Lab 7: Security Rules
tutorials.description: Replace the permissive starter rule with auth-based access controls.
